sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 11.94 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.11)

statement.latex: Describe all simply reducible\/ groups, that is, groups such that all their characters are real and the tensor product of any two irreducible representations contains no multiple components. This question is interesting for physicists. Is every finite simply reducible group soluble? { S.\,P.\,Strunkov} Yes, it is (L.\,S.\,Kazarin, E.\,I.\,Chankov, Sb. Math., { 201}, no.\,5 (2010), 655--668). %(rus...

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory I_INFINITE_SEARCH; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
